offer_name: Trademark Search, Screening, and Brand Protection
offer_positioning: Comprehensive IP protection for enterprise brand teams — from trademark clearance to counterfeit takedowns.
differentiators: AI-powered trademark clearance in minutes not days
End-to-end enforcement from detection to bulk takedown
Covers 180+ countries and all major e-commerce platforms
constraints: Do not imply the prospect already owns brand protection
Do not promise specific litigation outcomes
cta_offer_lock: Open to a quick 15-minute chat next week?
other_products:
Trademark Watching
Online Brand Protection
Domain Monitoring
company_notes: Corsearch helps enterprise IP teams detect and act on trademark conflicts and counterfeiting at scale. We eliminate risk from similar marks before filing and monitor live infringement across digital channels.
